allow: PowerShell($msg = "Add 3 AI Agents: Sales, Inventory, Dynamic Pricing`n`n- POST /ai/sales-agent: analyzes customer behavior, generates personalized discount offers and handles price negotiation`n- POST /ai/inventory-agent: 30-day sales velocity, predicts stock-outs, flags reorders`n- POST /ai/pricing-agent: hourly demand-based pricing, never below cost, logs to audit trail`n- GET /ai/agents/status: last-run data for all agents`n- Integrated inventory + pricing agents into autopilot daily run`n- Added AI Agents admin tab with status display and Run buttons`n- App.js: 1588 lines`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

PowerShell($msg = "Add next-level customer experience features`n`n- AR Try-On: 'Try On' button on clothing/accessories opens device camera \(getUserMedia\) with neon glassmorphism overlay and coming-soon animation`n- Smart Bundles AI: POST /ai/complete-look returns 3 AI-curated complementary products; product detail shows bundle with images, reasons, and 'Add Bundle 10% off' button`n- Live Chat upgrade: chat messages now detect matching products and render clickable mini product cards inline`n- Loyalty 2.0: added Platinum \(5000pts\) and Diamond \(10000pts\) tiers; animated progress bar with gradient fill and 'X pts to next tier' hint; tier-upgrade celebration toast on level-up`n- Tier constants upgraded: Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum/Diamond with distinct colors`n- App.js: 1623 lines`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); nan=[p for p in d if str\(p.get\('price',''\)\)=='NaN']; print\(f'Total products: {len\(d\)}, NaN prices: {len\(nan\)}, NaN IDs: {[p[\\"id\\"] for p in nan]}'\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://blex-production.up.railway.app/products"; $nan = $r | Where-Object { $_.price -eq $null -or $_.price -eq 'NaN' }; Write-Output "Total: $\($r.Count\), NaN/null: $\($nan.Count\), IDs: $\($nan.id -join ', '\)")
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/products" -Method GET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/products" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -First 3 | ConvertTo-Json)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Products:', len\(d\), '| First:', d[0].get\('name','?'\)[:40] if d else 'none'\)")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\Users\\blexc\\blex-store\\ | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne "node_modules" } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Total products:', len\(data\)\); cats={}; [cats.__setitem__\(p.get\('category','null'\), cats.get\(p.get\('category','null'\),0\)+1\) for p in data]; print\('By category:', cats\)")
Bash(awk '{len+=length\($0\)} END{print "Total desc bytes:", len, "Avg:", len/NR}')
